name_en: Original batch Burberry classic hot-selling tote bag, small size. No introduction needed, widely known. B brand first choice, suitable for all ages! Looks amazing when worn! Made from imported full-grain calfskin, paired with waterproof plaid cotton fabric! Exclusive factory stock, impeccable details and silhouette.
